segments.text: um okay so now we have uh zhanjaya abdumalik from kazakhstan uh she's uh uh women's or girls junior world champion a few years ago uh and uh i think she's rated uh well well above uh

well about 2400 at least I think almost 2500 in classical so she's evidently a strong player and I get my first white game so I'm gonna go for e4 and see what she does because I'm not really sure what her report you are is and

yeah we're back to back to team polgar uh and it's not a theme that all of the girls are going to be to be for team polgar and all of all of the guys are going to be for for team kramnik that's not how it's constituted i think there's uh there's a mix it just happens to be that way for the first couple of games and we have a pretty uh traditional

Closed Ruy Lopez. She has gone for Bb7, which is a bit surprising. Which line should I choose here? I don't know. Let's go for this one and then Nc3 next. Maybe this wasn't very good. B4, Nd5, there's Na5.

b4, knight e2, maybe? Oh, there's knight a5 immediately as well. Okay, then she doesn't give me a lot of choice, because I could take on b5 and win a pawn, but I don't think it would be worth it with my scuffed pawn structure. Let's go c3.
I think b3 is a reasonable option here, giving up a pawn for some... This, I think I'm fairly happy to give up the bishop.

just play on the fact that hopefully my bishop is going to be strong and once she tries to do something about that well first of all I can win a pawn with queen b4 I think d4 maybe even stronger if she takes I take back there's d5 but then knight c6 looks very promising for me

Maybe there's Rfc8, because I was thinking Ra8, and then Ed. Maybe that would be strong. I think now after a5, I don't think she should be concerned with b4. I have a lot of good options here, like Rd1, e5.
um also ed probably forcing i'll still ed5 knight f5 it's not so clear i'll go e5 seems uh seems very logical we'll go h3 i guess bring the knight around

Take on e7. Now she could take with a knight. I didn't need to give her that opportunity. But I think regardless I'm better here. But I probably haven't made the most of my chances. Knight h4 looks suspicious to me. Put the knight in the center and I can meet queen g5 with queen g3. I think this was at the very least an inaccuracy.

we have a possible line here queen g5 queen g3 takes takes takes takes knight f5 takes takes king e2 and i should be better in the rick ending let's see if that happens i think she has to take now otherwise e6 just falls

Maybe Rf8 first. Okay, and this exact line happened. Wow. Oh, that was a bad pre-move, because she could have gone Rook. But now I think I'm, at the very least, much better. I'm probably winning. Rd6, Rd7, then Rf7 and e7, and I just win.
because she has no counterplay and I'm just running to e8 and then f8.

There you go, all those arrows and it actually happens in the game. Okay, I feel like that was the best game so far. She played very well up to some point, but yeah, I think Night Age 4 was bad since I got to centralize in such a good way.
